<script type="text/javascript">
function setCookie(name, value, days){
var date = new Date();
date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days*24*60*60*1000)); 
var expires = "; expires=" + date.toGMTString();
document.cookie = name + "=" + value + expires + ";path=/";
}
function getParam(p){
var match = RegExp('[?&]' + p + '=([^&]*)').exec(window.location.search);
return match && decodeURIComponent(match[1].replace(/\+/g, ' '));
}
var gclid = getParam('gclid');
if(gclid){
var gclsrc = getParam('gclsrc');
if(!gclsrc || gclsrc.indexOf('aw') !== -1){
setCookie('gclid', gclid, 90);
}
}
</script>
<script> 
function readCookie(name) { 
var n = name + "="; 
var cookie = document.cookie.split(';'); 
for(var i=0;i < cookie.length;i++) {      
var c = cookie[i];      
while (c.charAt(0)==' '){c = c.substring(1,c.length);}      
if (c.indexOf(n) == 0){return c.substring(n.length,c.length);} 
} 
return null; 
} 
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid1') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid1').value = readCookie('gclid');

As a nationally recognized rehab center, we specialize in treating co-occurring mental health, trauma, and addiction disorders with outstanding, personalized care.</p> <p>Our Florida rehab center’s optimal patient-to-therapist ratio creates an intimate setting, ensuring patients receive personalized attention throughout their recovery journey. This relaxed environment helps individuals feel more at home so they can focus entirely on their sobriety and mental well-being.</p> <p>For more details on our specialized programs, explore our <a href="https://www.beachway.com/substance-abuse/addiction-recovery/">Addiction Recovery in West Palm Beach </a>services, our <a href="https://www.beachway.com/mental-health/">Florida Mental Health Treatment</a>, or our <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/trauma-focused-therapy/">PTSD/Trauma Treatment</a> options.</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="section-general-content relative overflow-hidden lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55" > <div class="img-with-content_gradient-left bg-blue_two absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1"> </div> <div class="container-fluid 1366:px-[140px] max_width_1365:px-[80px]"> <div class="block relative m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="title title_white text-center mb-20"> <h2 class="font-700 uppercase h3"> Inpatient and Outpatient Rehab Programs in Florida </h2> </div> <div class="content text-white content-white"> <p style="text-align: center;">Unlike some rehabs in Florida, Beachway Therapy Center offers a full range of treatment solutions, including both <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/inpatient/">inpatient rehab</a> and <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/outpatient/">outpatient programs</a> to meet each client’s unique needs.</p> <p style="text-align: center;">Our inpatient treatment provides a luxury experience with top-tier amenities and and 24/7 support, helping individuals conquer addiction or mental health challenges through intensive therapy and holistic care in residence.</p> <p style="text-align: center;">We also offer flexible outpatient programs – such as <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/outpatient/php/">Partial Hospitalization (PHP)</a> and <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/outpatient/iop/">Intensive Outpatient (IOP)</a> – for those who need structured support while transitioning back to daily life. No matter the program level, our team delivers a continuum of care that maximizes each individual’s chance of long-term recovery and successful sobriety.</p> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__btn pt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Treatment Programs in Florida</a> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section data-bg="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/section-bg-blue-1.jpg" class="home-zigzag-wrapper lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55 bg-pattern-blue__one wow fadeInUp rocket-lazyload" data-wow-delay="0.2s" " style=""> <div class="home-zigzag"> <div class="container"> <div class="home-zigzag__inner relative z-1 px-15"> <div class="row items-center"> <div class="lg:w-6/12 w-full"> <div class="home-zigzag__content lg:pr-80"> <div class="home-zigzag__content--inner"> <div class="home-zigzag__content--title title_white mt-10 lg:text-left text-center wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <h2 class="font-bernina uppercase font-700 h3"> Holistic Recovery in a Private, Intimate Setting </h2> </div> <div class="home-zigzag__content--desc mt-20 text-white wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.6s"> <div class="ctm-yellow-hover"> <p>Our South Florida addiction and mental health treatment center in West Palm Beach offers a calm and safe environment for patients to focus on healing. Each individual receives a customized treatment plan tailored to their needs, combining proven therapeutic modalities with a holistic wellness approach. Our multidisciplinary team addresses the underlying causes of addiction, recognizing that successful recovery must heal both mind and body.</p> <p>We offer a full continuum of care – from on-site medical detox and inpatient rehab programs to outpatient therapy and aftercare – to support patients at every stage of the journey. Beachway also specializes in dual diagnosis treatment, simultaneously treating substance abuse and co-occurring mental health issues (like depression or anxiety) that can hinder recovery.</p> <p>For those who have experienced trauma, our certified trauma-focused therapy programs help patients overcome past challenges in a supportive setting. Additionally, beyond clinical treatment, we encourage healthy connections and activities such as <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/recreational-therapy/">yoga</a>, <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/art-therapy/">art therapy</a>, music, and <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/specialty-programs/aftercare/">group support</a> to nurture the spirit and build a strong foundation for lasting recovery.</p> </div> </div> <div class="home-zigzag__content--btn mt-20 lg:text-left text-center wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.6s"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Holistic Therapy</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="lg:w-6/12 w-full"> <div class="home-zigzag__image lg:pt-0 pt-55 flex lg:justify-end justify-center"> <div class="home-zigzag__image--inner"> <div class="home-zigzag__imagegrp wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="home-zigzag__imagegrp-one"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/beachway-rehab-patient-journaling-outdoors.png 800w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/beachway-rehab-patient-journaling-outdoors-236x300.png 236w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/beachway-rehab-patient-journaling-outdoors-768x975.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 800px) 100vw, 800px" alt="Woman journaling outdoors at Beachway Therapy Center during a recovery session." data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/beachway-rehab-patient-journaling-outdoors.png" />

</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section data-bg="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/pattern-2.1e7216.png" class="treatment-grid-wrapper lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55 bg-pattern-two wow fadeInUp rocket-lazyload" data-wow-delay="0.2s" style=""> <div class="treatment-grid"> <div class="treatment-grid__main"> <div class="treatment-grid__inner"> <div class="container titlepart-container !px-30"> <div class="treatment-grid__title title_blue_one text-center wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <h3 class="uppercase font-700 text-center font-bernina">Evidence-Based Addiction and Mental Health Treatment Programs</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-grid__subtitle mt-20 sm:text-center text-left text-fonts wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <p>As a leading drug rehab in Florida, Beachway focuses on treating drug and alcohol addition at its root cause to support long-term recovery. We offer a variety of treatment plans and therapy approaches, including long-term rehab programs ranging from 30 days to 60 days, 90 days, or even up to a year in residence, depending on each patient's needs. Our clinical and medical teams provide fully individualized care, using evidence-based therapies to help patients replace destructive habits with healthy. productive ones. In addition to treating substance abuse, we also address any underlying mental health disorders – such as depression, PTSD, or anxiety – through integrated care, ensuring that clients build a strong foundation for lifelong recovery.</p> </div> </div> <div class="container-small"> <div class="treatment-grid__main-desktop treatment-grid__main pt-55 sm:block hidden"> <div class="treatment-grid__loop grid xl:grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-2 grid-cols-1 lg:gap-y-40 md:gap-y-30 gap-y-20 lg:gap-x-40 md:gap-x-30 gap-x-20"> <div class="treatment-grid__item"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--inner"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--box wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card relative"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1-768x958.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-1" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1.png" />
<noscript><img width="882" height="1100" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1.png" srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1-768x958.png 768w" sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-1"  /></noscript>
<div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content absolute top-0 left-0 p-28"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-inner flex items-center"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-icon"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatent-cardicon-1" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-1.svg" />
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-1.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatent-cardicon-1"  /></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-title title_blue_one ml-20"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Trauma Treatment Program</h3> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__inner"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__main"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__icon text-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 57px) 100vw, 57px" alt="treatent-cardicon-1" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-1.svg"/>
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-1.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 57px) 100vw, 57px" alt="treatent-cardicon-1"  class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto"/></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__title title_blue_one mt-20 text-center"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Trauma Treatment Program</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__desc mt-20 text-fonts"> <p>Trauma and PTSD affect millions of Americans and often lead to depression and/or anxiety disorders. Individuals who suffer from PTSD or trauma are at a higher risk of developing an addiction to drugs or alcohol, as it may be used as a crutch to cope with their pain. We offer a well-rounded program with a variety of services. Trauma therapy utilizes experiential therapies to encourage patients to participate fully and engage in the treatment process. Therapies can include inner-child work, psychodrama, process therapy, talk therapy, and meditation. Individuals participating in trauma-informed care can expect to meet with a group throughout the week. Our trauma program is a cornerstone of why we're considered a leading addiction treatment center in Florida.</p> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__btn mt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/trauma-focused-therapy/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Trauma Therapy</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-grid__item"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--inner"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--box wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card relative"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-2.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-2-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-2-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-2-768x958.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-2" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-2.png" />

</div> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-title title_blue_one ml-20"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Dual Diagnosis Treatment Program</h3> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__inner"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__main"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__icon text-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-2" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-2.svg"/>

</div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__title title_blue_one mt-20 text-center"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Dual Diagnosis Treatment Program</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__desc mt-20 text-fonts"> <p>When left untreated, underlying mental health issues can make it difficult for patients to overcome addiction. Our dual diagnosis treatment program allows us to proactively identify and treat mental health issues and other factors that may be contributing to a patient's addictive behavior. By determining the possible factors causing a patient's addiction, our team of experts can treat the problem at its source to provide lasting recovery and reduce the risk of relapse. This comprehensive approach sets us apart from other rehabs in Florida that may not address co-occurring disorders, including facilities like Compassion Behavioral Health.</p> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__btn mt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/mental-health/dual-diagnosis-treatments/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Dual Diagnosis Recovery</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-grid__item"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--inner"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--box wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card relative"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-3.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-3-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-3-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-3-768x958.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-3" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-3.png" />

</div> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-title title_blue_one ml-20"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Long-Term Luxury Rehab Options</h3> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__inner"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__main"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__icon text-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-3" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-3.svg"/>
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-3.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-3"  class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto"/></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__title title_blue_one mt-20 text-center"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Long-Term Luxury Rehab Options</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__desc mt-20 text-fonts"> <p>The main benefit of long-term rehab centers is the gift of time. In some 30-day rehab programs, the first several days or weeks may be focused on the detoxification stage, leaving little time to break old harmful habits and form new ones. When an individual enters a long-term inpatient rehab center, they gain a support network of trained therapists, counselors, medical professionals, and other patients. Together, over a period of time, the members of a treatment community create a healthy, positive environment to heal and grow. </p> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__btn mt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/specialty-programs/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Our Specialty Programs</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-grid__item"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--inner"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--box wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card relative"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-4.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-4-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-4-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-4-768x958.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-4" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-4.png" />

</div> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-title title_blue_one ml-20"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">On-Site Detox Rehab Services</h3> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__inner"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__main"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__icon text-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 80px) 100vw, 80px" alt="treatent-cardicon-4" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-4.svg"/>
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-4.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 80px) 100vw, 80px" alt="treatent-cardicon-4"  class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto"/></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__title title_blue_one mt-20 text-center"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">On-Site Detox Rehab Services</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__desc mt-20 text-fonts"> <p>Detox is an important phase of addiction recovery. It's the process in which the body flushes out the toxic substances that result in the patient's physical dependence. Depending on the specific substance and severity of addiction, medical detox can be an extremely vulnerable time for patients and may be accompanied by uncomfortable and sometimes fatal withdrawal symptoms. Our team of physicians and addiction specialists collaborates to provide patients with the professional medical attention needed to manage withdrawal symptoms and monitor vitals during detoxification. </p> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__btn mt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/detox/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Detox Programs</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-grid__item"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--inner"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--box wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card relative"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5-768x958.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-5" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5.png" />

</div> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-title title_blue_one ml-20"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Mental Health Treatment Options</h3> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__inner"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__main"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__icon text-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-5" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-5.svg"/>
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-5.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-5"  class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto"/></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__title title_blue_one mt-20 text-center"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Mental Health Treatment Options</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__desc mt-20 text-fonts"> <p>Mental health disorders, such as depression, anxiety, PTSD, and bipolar disorder, can make it extremely hard to sustain long-term recovery and can negatively impact social relationships. Diagnosing and treating these mental health issues can provide the empowerment and strength needed to repair relationships, make healthy life choices, and ultimately overcome struggles with addiction. Our team strives to fully understand each person's challenges and facilitate healing of the mind, body, and spirit through a comprehensive approach. At our luxury mental health facility in Florida, we provide personalized attention and customized treatment plans to provide the best services possible. </p> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__btn mt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/locations/west-palm-beach/" class="btn-yellow">Explore More Florida Therapy Options</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-grid__main-mobile treatment-grid__main pt-55 sm:hidden block"> <div class="treatment-grid__loop treatment-grid__mobile--slider overflow-hidden"> <div class="swiper-wrapper"> <div class="swiper-slide"> <div class="treatment-grid__item"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--inner"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--box wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card relative"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1-768x958.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-1" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-1.png" />

</div> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-title title_blue_one ml-20"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Trauma Treatment Program</h3> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__inner"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__main"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__icon text-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 57px) 100vw, 57px" alt="treatent-cardicon-1" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-1.svg" />
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-1.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 57px) 100vw, 57px" alt="treatent-cardicon-1" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" /></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__title title_blue_one mt-20 text-center"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase">Trauma Treatment Program</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__desc mt-20 text-fonts"> <p>Trauma and PTSD affect millions of Americans and often lead to depression and/or anxiety disorders. Individuals who suffer from PTSD or trauma are at a higher risk of developing an addiction to drugs or alcohol, as it may be used as a crutch to cope with their pain. We offer a well-rounded program with a variety of services. Trauma therapy utilizes experiential therapies to encourage patients to participate fully and engage in the treatment process. Therapies can include inner-child work, psychodrama, process therapy, talk therapy, and meditation. Individuals participating in trauma-informed care can expect to meet with a group throughout the week. Our trauma program is a cornerstone of why we're considered a leading addiction treatment center in Florida.</p> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__btn mt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/trauma-focused-therapy/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Trauma Therapy</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="swiper-slide"> <div class="treatment-grid__item"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--inner"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--box wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card relative"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-2.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-2-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-2-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-2-768x958.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-2" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-2.png" />

</div> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-title title_blue_one ml-20"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Dual Diagnosis Treatment Program</h3> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__inner"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__main"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__icon text-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-2" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-2.svg" />
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-2.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-2" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" /></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__title title_blue_one mt-20 text-center"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase">Dual Diagnosis Treatment Program</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__desc mt-20 text-fonts"> <p>When left untreated, underlying mental health issues can make it difficult for patients to overcome addiction. Our dual diagnosis treatment program allows us to proactively identify and treat mental health issues and other factors that may be contributing to a patient's addictive behavior. By determining the possible factors causing a patient's addiction, our team of experts can treat the problem at its source to provide lasting recovery and reduce the risk of relapse. This comprehensive approach sets us apart from other rehabs in Florida that may not address co-occurring disorders, including facilities like Compassion Behavioral Health.</p> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__btn mt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/mental-health/dual-diagnosis-treatments/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Dual Diagnosis Recovery</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="swiper-slide"> <div class="treatment-grid__item"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--inner"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--box wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card relative"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-3.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-3-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-3-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-3-768x958.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-3" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-3.png" />

</div> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-title title_blue_one ml-20"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Long-Term Luxury Rehab Options</h3> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__inner"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__main"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__icon text-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-3" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-3.svg" />
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-3.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-3" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" /></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__title title_blue_one mt-20 text-center"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase">Long-Term Luxury Rehab Options</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__desc mt-20 text-fonts"> <p>The main benefit of long-term rehab centers is the gift of time. In some 30-day rehab programs, the first several days or weeks may be focused on the detoxification stage, leaving little time to break old harmful habits and form new ones. When an individual enters a long-term inpatient rehab center, they gain a support network of trained therapists, counselors, medical professionals, and other patients. Together, over a period of time, the members of a treatment community create a healthy, positive environment to heal and grow. </p> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__btn mt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/specialty-programs/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Our Specialty Programs</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="swiper-slide"> <div class="treatment-grid__item"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--inner"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--box wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card relative"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-4.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-4-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-4-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-4-768x958.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-4" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-4.png" />

</div> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-title title_blue_one ml-20"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">On-Site Detox Rehab Services</h3> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__inner"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__main"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__icon text-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 80px) 100vw, 80px" alt="treatent-cardicon-4" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-4.svg" />
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-4.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 80px) 100vw, 80px" alt="treatent-cardicon-4" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" /></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__title title_blue_one mt-20 text-center"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase">On-Site Detox Rehab Services</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__desc mt-20 text-fonts"> <p>Detox is an important phase of addiction recovery. It's the process in which the body flushes out the toxic substances that result in the patient's physical dependence. Depending on the specific substance and severity of addiction, medical detox can be an extremely vulnerable time for patients and may be accompanied by uncomfortable and sometimes fatal withdrawal symptoms. Our team of physicians and addiction specialists collaborates to provide patients with the professional medical attention needed to manage withdrawal symptoms and monitor vitals during detoxification. </p> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__btn mt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/detox/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Detox Programs</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="swiper-slide"> <div class="treatment-grid__item"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--inner"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--box wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card relative"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" data-lazy-srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5-768x958.png 768w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-5" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5.png" />
<noscript><img width="882" height="1100" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5.png" srcset="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5.png 882w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5-241x300.png 241w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5-821x1024.png 821w, https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatment-card-image-5-768x958.png 768w" sizes="(max-width: 882px) 100vw, 882px" alt="treatment-card-image-5" /></noscript>

<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-5.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-5" /></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-grid__item--card-content-title title_blue_one ml-20"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase h6">Mental Health Treatment Options</h3> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__inner"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__main"> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__icon text-center"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" srcset="" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-5" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-5.svg" />
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/treatent-cardicon-5.svg" srcset="" sizes="(max-width: 81px) 100vw, 81px" alt="treatent-cardicon-5" class="w-[56px] h-[56px] object-contain m-auto" /></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__title title_blue_one mt-20 text-center"> <h3 class="font-bernina font-700 uppercase">Mental Health Treatment Options</h3> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__desc mt-20 text-fonts"> <p>Mental health disorders, such as depression, anxiety, PTSD, and bipolar disorder, can make it extremely hard to sustain long-term recovery and can negatively impact social relationships. Diagnosing and treating these mental health issues can provide the empowerment and strength needed to repair relationships, make healthy life choices, and ultimately overcome struggles with addiction. Our team strives to fully understand each person's challenges and facilitate healing of the mind, body, and spirit through a comprehensive approach. At our luxury mental health facility in Florida, we provide personalized attention and customized treatment plans to provide the best services possible. </p> </div> <div class="treatment-overlaycard__btn mt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/locations/west-palm-beach/" class="btn-yellow">Explore More Florida Therapy Options</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="relative flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-5 pt-55"> <div class="treatment-button-prev slider-arrow"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="slider-arrow" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/arrow-black-prev.22da97.svg">
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/arrow-black-prev.22da97.svg" alt="slider-arrow"></noscript>
</div> <div class="treatment-button-next slider-arrow"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="slider-arrow" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/arrow-black-nxt.fdec11.svg">
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/arrow-black-nxt.fdec11.svg" alt="slider-arrow"></noscript>
</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="section-general-content relative overflow-hidden lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55" > <div class="img-with-content_gradient absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1"> </div> <div class="container-fluid 1366:px-[140px] max_width_1365:px-[80px]"> <div class="block relative text-center m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="title title_white text-center mb-20"> <h2 class="font-700 uppercase h3"> Luxury Florida Rehab Facility: Top-Notch Amenities </h2> </div> <div class="content text-white content-white"> <p>Located in West Palm Beach, Palm Beach County – in the heart of South Florida – our resort-style rehab campus allows individuals to begin recovery in comfort. We offer high-end amenities including a private swimming pool, a fitness studio, a meditation room, and beautifully landscaped gardens, so patients can enjoy tranquil accommodations during their stay with us.</p> <p>Our West Palm Beach treatment center even provides easy access to the beach, a peaceful retreat that patients can visit as part of their healing process. These top-notch amenities make recovery at Beachway feel less like a hospital and more like a rejuvenating retreat, helping clients stay relaxed and focused on their wellness.</p> </div> <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center lg:gap-x-40 md:gap-x-30 gap-x-20 gap-y-20 mt-20"> <div class="icon-content-card__btn pt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/our-facility/gallery/" class="btn-yellow">View Our Rehab Facility Gallery</a> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__btn pt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/our-facility/" class="btn-yellow">Learn More About Our Facility</a> </div> <div> </div> <div class="block relative text-center m-0 p-0 w-full first:pt-0 last:pb-0 lg:py-40 py-20 general-block-content"> <div class="title title_white text-center mb-20"> <h2 class="font-700 uppercase h3"> Get Started With Beachway Today </h2> </div> <div class="content text-white content-white"> <p>Anyone struggling with addiction can start the path to recovery with addiction therapy in Florida. Our addiction rehab center offers an intimate atmosphere, compassionate staff, and evidence-based therapy treatments. We’re ready and waiting to help new patients embark on their journey to sobriety. As a trusted addiction treatment center and mental health rehab, we’re committed to your successful recovery journey or that of your loved one.</p> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__btn pt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/contact/" class="btn-yellow">Receive Mental Health or Addiction Help</a> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="section-testimonial relative z-1 w-full lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55 m-0" > <div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1 bg-blue_two"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="beachway016" class="w-full h-full object-cover opacity-20 mix-blend-overlay" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/beachway016.d9c799.jpg">
<noscript><img width="3287" height="2501" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/beachway016.d9c799.jpg" alt="beachway016" class="w-full h-full object-cover opacity-20 mix-blend-overlay"></noscript>
</div> <div class="container-fluid sm:pl-0"> <div class="flex flex-wrap items-center w-full m-0 p-0 lg:gap-0 gap-0"> <div class="xl:w-8/12 lg:w-7/12 w-full lg:order-1 order-2 lg:pr-40"> <div dir="rtl" class="testimonial-slide swiper"> <div class="swiper-wrapper"> <div class="swiper-slide"> <div dir="ltr" class="testimonial-box"> <div class="quote-left mb-10"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-top.be6e14.svg">
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-top.be6e14.svg" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block"></noscript>
</div> <p>I felt welcomed when I arrived at Beachway Therapy Center. I was greeted really well with open arms. I felt comfortable being there and I was able to get really close to the staff and get to know them really well. The facility was good. It was all up-to-date. They have given me the stepping stone, the push-start I needed in my recovery. They set me up for success, and they showed me the right path and what to do. It was a life-changing experience. </p> <div class="quote-right mt-10"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block ml-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-bottom.0e8410.svg">
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-bottom.0e8410.svg" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block ml-auto"></noscript>
</div> <div class="title_white text-right mt-[28px]"> <span class="uppercase font-bernina font-700 h6"> - Michael </span> </div> </div> </div> <div class="swiper-slide"> <div dir="ltr" class="testimonial-box"> <div class="quote-left mb-10"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-top.be6e14.svg">
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-top.be6e14.svg" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block"></noscript>
</div> <p>Beachway Therapy Center was fast, welcoming and friendly. Their orientation was nice and, right away, aesthetically pleasing. Their reps were not only accommodating, but they really wanted to understand my needs and how they can better suit me. So the interactions were very personal. It felt very much not a cookie-cutter type of environment and they really cared about it being a comprehensive experience. It was fantastic.</p> <div class="quote-right mt-10"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block ml-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-bottom.0e8410.svg">
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-bottom.0e8410.svg" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block ml-auto"></noscript>
</div> <div class="title_white text-right mt-[28px]"> <span class="uppercase font-bernina font-700 h6"> - Will </span> </div> </div> </div> <div class="swiper-slide"> <div dir="ltr" class="testimonial-box"> <div class="quote-left mb-10"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-top.be6e14.svg">
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-top.be6e14.svg" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block"></noscript>
</div> <p>I came to Beachway broken and at the end of my rope. My journey and growth was not easy there, but each and every person had a story of their own that inspired me to keep on growing..keep on moving forward. The amazing therapist's, the tec's, the chef and even the program director all have a story and a struggle they overcame! I have found myself again....I am free of the pain and heartache of addiction. I still work hard to stay that way, but Beachway gave me the tools I needed to live a wholehearted and joyful life! </p> <div class="quote-right mt-10"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block ml-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-bottom.0e8410.svg">
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-bottom.0e8410.svg" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block ml-auto"></noscript>
</div> <div class="title_white text-right mt-[28px]"> <span class="uppercase font-bernina font-700 h6"> - Lisa </span> </div> </div> </div> <div class="swiper-slide"> <div dir="ltr" class="testimonial-box"> <div class="quote-left mb-10"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-top.be6e14.svg">
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-top.be6e14.svg" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block"></noscript>
</div> <p>Beachway is a special place. They helped me find myself again. The staff really care about the clients, the amenities are excellent, the houses are homelike, the food is made to order, and the alumni services are unmatched. I highly recommend Beachway to anyone who needs help with mental health and/or substance abuse of any kind. </p> <div class="quote-right mt-10"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block ml-auto" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-bottom.0e8410.svg">
<noscript><img src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/quote-bottom.0e8410.svg" alt="quote" class="max-w-full h-auto block ml-auto"></noscript>
</div> <div class="title_white text-right mt-[28px]"> <span class="uppercase font-bernina font-700 h6"> - Emily </span> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div dir="ltr" class="relative lg:hidden flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-20 pt-40"> <div class="testimonial-button-prev slider-arrow"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="slider-arrow" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/arrow-black-prev.22da97.svg">

 Trauma Healing 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Beachway Therapy Center: A Leading Trauma, Mental Health & Addiction Rehab in West Palm Beach Florida 
 
 
 
Since 2008, Beachway Therapy Center has helped patients overcome Trauma, Mental Health, and Addiction issues through exceptional, individualized rehab programs in West Palm Beach, Florida. As a nationally recognized rehab center, we specialize in treating co-occurring mental health, trauma, and addiction disorders with outstanding, personalized care.
 
Our Florida rehab center’s optimal patient-to-therapist ratio creates an intimate setting, ensuring patients receive personalized attention throughout their recovery journey. This relaxed environment helps individuals feel more at home so they can focus entirely on their sobriety and mental well-being.
 
For more details on our specialized programs, explore our Addiction Recovery in West Palm Beach services, our Florida Mental Health Treatment , or our PTSD/Trauma Treatment options.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Inpatient and Outpatient Rehab Programs in Florida 
 
 
 
Unlike some rehabs in Florida, Beachway Therapy Center offers a full range of treatment solutions, including both inpatient rehab and outpatient programs to meet each client’s unique needs.
 
Our inpatient treatment provides a luxury experience with top-tier amenities and and 24/7 support, helping individuals conquer addiction or mental health challenges through intensive therapy and holistic care in residence.
 
We also offer flexible outpatient programs – such as Partial Hospitalization (PHP) and Intensive Outpatient (IOP) – for those who need structured support while transitioning back to daily life. No matter the program level, our team delivers a continuum of care that maximizes each individual’s chance of long-term recovery and successful sobriety.
 
 
 Learn More About Treatment Programs in Florida 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Holistic Recovery in a Private, Intimate Setting 
 
 
 
 
Our South Florida addiction and mental health treatment center in West Palm Beach offers a calm and safe environment for patients to focus on healing. Each individual receives a customized treatment plan tailored to their needs, combining proven therapeutic modalities with a holistic wellness approach. Our multidisciplinary team addresses the underlying causes of addiction, recognizing that successful recovery must heal both mind and body.
 
We offer a full continuum of care – from on-site medical detox and inpatient rehab programs to outpatient therapy and aftercare – to support patients at every stage of the journey. Beachway also specializes in dual diagnosis treatment, simultaneously treating substance abuse and co-occurring mental health issues (like depression or anxiety) that can hinder recovery.
 
For those who have experienced trauma, our certified trauma-focused therapy programs help patients overcome past challenges in a supportive setting. Additionally, beyond clinical treatment, we encourage healthy connections and activities such as yoga , art therapy , music, and group support to nurture the spirit and build a strong foundation for lasting recovery.
 
 
 
 Learn More About Holistic Therapy 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Evidence-Based Addiction and Mental Health Treatment Programs
 
 
 
As a leading drug rehab in Florida, Beachway focuses on treating drug and alcohol addition at its root cause to support long-term recovery. We offer a variety of treatment plans and therapy approaches, including long-term rehab programs ranging from 30 days to 60 days, 90 days, or even up to a year in residence, depending on each patient's needs. Our clinical and medical teams provide fully individualized care, using evidence-based therapies to help patients replace destructive habits with healthy. productive ones. In addition to treating substance abuse, we also address any underlying mental health disorders – such as depression, PTSD, or anxiety – through integrated care, ensuring that clients build a strong foundation for lifelong recovery.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
Trauma Treatment Program
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
Trauma Treatment Program
 
 
 
Trauma and PTSD affect millions of Americans and often lead to depression and/or anxiety disorders. Individuals who suffer from PTSD or trauma are at a higher risk of developing an addiction to drugs or alcohol, as it may be used as a crutch to cope with their pain. We offer a well-rounded program with a variety of services. Trauma therapy utilizes experiential therapies to encourage patients to participate fully and engage in the treatment process. Therapies can include inner-child work, psychodrama, process therapy, talk therapy, and meditation. Individuals participating in trauma-informed care can expect to meet with a group throughout the week. Our trauma program is a cornerstone of why we're considered a leading addiction treatment center in Florida.
 
 
 Learn More About Trauma Therapy 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment Program
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
Dual Diagnosis Treatment Program
 
 
 
When left untreated, underlying mental health issues can make it difficult for patients to overcome addiction. Our dual diagnosis treatment program allows us to proactively identify and treat mental health issues and other factors that may be contributing to a patient's addictive behavior. By determining the possible factors causing a patient's addiction, our team of experts can treat the problem at its source to provide lasting recovery and reduce the risk of relapse. This comprehensive approach sets us apart from other rehabs in Florida that may not address co-occurring disorders, including facilities like Compassion Behavioral Health.
 
 
 Learn More About Dual Diagnosis Recovery 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
Long-Term Luxury Rehab Options
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
Long-Term Luxury Rehab Options
 
 
 
The main benefit of long-term rehab centers is the gift of time. In some 30-day rehab programs, the first several days or weeks may be focused on the detoxification stage, leaving little time to break old harmful habits and form new ones. When an individual enters a long-term inpatient rehab center, they gain a support network of trained therapists, counselors, medical professionals, and other patients. Together, over a period of time, the members of a treatment community create a healthy, positive environment to heal and grow. 
 
 
 Learn More About Our Specialty Programs 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
On-Site Detox Rehab Services
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
On-Site Detox Rehab Services
 
 
 
Detox is an important phase of addiction recovery. It's the process in which the body flushes out the toxic substances that result in the patient's physical dependence. Depending on the specific substance and severity of addiction, medical detox can be an extremely vulnerable time for patients and may be accompanied by uncomfortable and sometimes fatal withdrawal symptoms. Our team of physicians and addiction specialists collaborates to provide patients with the professional medical attention needed to manage withdrawal symptoms and monitor vitals during detoxification. 
 
 
 Learn More About Detox Programs 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
Mental Health Treatment Options
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
Mental Health Treatment Options
 
 
 
Mental health disorders, such as depression, anxiety, PTSD, and bipolar disorder, can make it extremely hard to sustain long-term recovery and can negatively impact social relationships. Diagnosing and treating these mental health issues can provide the empowerment and strength needed to repair relationships, make healthy life choices, and ultimately overcome struggles with addiction. Our team strives to fully understand each person's challenges and facilitate healing of the mind, body, and spirit through a comprehensive approach. At our luxury mental health facility in Florida, we provide personalized attention and customized treatment plans to provide the best services possible. 
 
 
 Explore More Florida Therapy Options 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
Trauma Treatment Program
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
Trauma Treatment Program
 
 
 
Trauma and PTSD affect millions of Americans and often lead to depression and/or anxiety disorders. Individuals who suffer from PTSD or trauma are at a higher risk of developing an addiction to drugs or alcohol, as it may be used as a crutch to cope with their pain. We offer a well-rounded program with a variety of services. Trauma therapy utilizes experiential therapies to encourage patients to participate fully and engage in the treatment process. Therapies can include inner-child work, psychodrama, process therapy, talk therapy, and meditation. Individuals participating in trauma-informed care can expect to meet with a group throughout the week. Our trauma program is a cornerstone of why we're considered a leading addiction treatment center in Florida.
 
 
 Learn More About Trauma Therapy

Our dual diagnosis treatment program allows us to proactively identify and treat mental health issues and other factors that may be contributing to a patient's addictive behavior.  Learn More About Dual Diagnosis Recovery

 Learn More About Detox Programs

Mental Health Treatment Options

Diagnosing and treating these mental health issues can provide the empowerment and strength needed to repair relationships, make healthy life choices, and ultimately overcome struggles with addiction. Our team strives to fully understand each person's challenges and facilitate healing of the mind, body, and spirit through a comprehensive approach. At our luxury mental health facility in Florida, we provide personalized attention and customized treatment plans to provide the best services possible. 
 
 
 Explore More Florida Therapy Options 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Luxury Florida Rehab Facility: Top-Notch Amenities 
 
 
 
Located in West Palm Beach, Palm Beach County – in the heart of South Florida – our resort-style rehab campus allows individuals to begin recovery in comfort. We offer high-end amenities including a private swimming pool, a fitness studio, a meditation room, and beautifully landscaped gardens, so patients can enjoy tranquil accommodations during their stay with us.
 
Our West Palm Beach treatment center even provides easy access to the beach, a peaceful retreat that patients can visit as part of their healing process. These top-notch amenities make recovery at Beachway feel less like a hospital and more like a rejuvenating retreat, helping clients stay relaxed and focused on their wellness.
 
 
 
 View Our Rehab Facility Gallery 
 
 Learn More About Our Facility 
 
 
 
 
 
 Get Started With Beachway Today 
 
 
 
Anyone struggling with addiction can start the path to recovery with addiction therapy in Florida. Our addiction rehab center offers an intimate atmosphere, compassionate staff, and evidence-based therapy treatments. We’re ready and waiting to help new patients embark on their journey to sobriety. As a trusted addiction treatment center and mental health rehab, we’re committed to your successful recovery journey or that of your loved one.
 
 
 Receive Mental Health or Addiction Help 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
I felt welcomed when I arrived at Beachway Therapy Center. I was greeted really well with open arms. I felt comfortable being there and I was able to get really close to the staff and get to know them really well. The facility was good. It was all up-to-date. They have given me the stepping stone, the push-start I needed in my recovery. They set me up for success, and they showed me the right path and what to do. It was a life-changing experience. 
 
 
 

 
 - Michael 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
Beachway Therapy Center was fast, welcoming and friendly. Their orientation was nice and, right away, aesthetically pleasing. Their reps were not only accommodating, but they really wanted to understand my needs and how they can better suit me. So the interactions were very personal. It felt very much not a cookie-cutter type of environment and they really cared about it being a comprehensive experience. It was fantastic.
 
 
 

 
 - Will 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
I came to Beachway broken and at the end of my rope. My journey and growth was not easy there, but each and every person had a story of their own that inspired me to keep on growing..keep on moving forward. The amazing therapist's, the tec's, the chef and even the program director all have a story and a struggle they overcame! I have found myself again....I am free of the pain and heartache of addiction. I still work hard to stay that way, but Beachway gave me the tools I needed to live a wholehearted and joyful life! 
 
 
 

 
 - Lisa 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
Beachway is a special place. They helped me find myself again. The staff really care about the clients, the amenities are excellent, the houses are homelike, the food is made to order, and the alumni services are unmatched. I highly recommend Beachway to anyone who needs help with mental health and/or substance abuse of any kind. 
 
 
 

 
 - Emily 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 We’ve Helped Thousands of People Recover. 
 
 Will You Be Next? 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 Our Accreditations 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Begin Your Recovery at Beachway Therapy Center 
 
 
Discover your personal journey to healing at our West Palm Beach rehab and therapy center. Call us today at 877-284-0353 or complete the contact form below, and a member of our staff will be in touch to help you get started. As a leading addiction treatment center and mental health rehab in Florida, we're here to guide you and your loved ones every step of the way. Our Florida rehab center is committed to helping you achieve lasting recovery.

<script type="text/javascript">
function setCookie(name, value, days){
var date = new Date();
date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days*24*60*60*1000)); 
var expires = "; expires=" + date.toGMTString();
document.cookie = name + "=" + value + expires + ";path=/";
}
function getParam(p){
var match = RegExp('[?&]' + p + '=([^&]*)').exec(window.location.search);
return match && decodeURIComponent(match[1].replace(/\+/g, ' '));
}
var gclid = getParam('gclid');
if(gclid){
var gclsrc = getParam('gclsrc');
if(!gclsrc || gclsrc.indexOf('aw') !== -1){
setCookie('gclid', gclid, 90);
}
}
</script>
<script> 
function readCookie(name) { 
var n = name + "="; 
var cookie = document.cookie.split(';'); 
for(var i=0;i < cookie.length;i++) {      
var c = cookie[i];      
while (c.charAt(0)==' '){c = c.substring(1,c.length);}      
if (c.indexOf(n) == 0){return c.substring(n.length,c.length);} 
} 
return null; 
} 
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid1') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid1').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid2') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid2').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid3') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid3').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid4') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid4').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
</script>

class="block w-full h-full object-cover absolute top-0 left-0" /></noscript>
</div> </div> <div class="lg:flex-1 w-full lg:order-1"> <div class="title title_white mb-20 wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <h2 class="font-700 uppercase mdscreen:text-center h3"> Philosophy of Treatment </h2> </div> <div class="content content-with-title text-white title_black content-list-white wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.4s"> <p>Treatment involves the sense of community, commitment, accountability, identification with others, and meaningful relationships formed throughout the journey. One of the many gifts of coming to treatment is the interruption of maladaptive patterns and the process of finding out that you are not alone. It is a tremendous relief to finally find a place where the truth can be told, and people understand. Beachway Therapy Center is a place of healing. People shift by taking time to discover who they really are and working to find healthier coping strategies. Committing to treatment and changing an unhealthy way of living is not an easy task.</p> <p>Often, patients want to leave treatment citing many reasons and excuses as to why treatment won’t work for them AND we understand that this is normal behavior for someone who is in pain and cannot manage their emotions in a healthy way. The most common phrase we hear is, “I know what I need to do”. This statement is consistently challenged as we understand that individuals have trouble distinguishing the true from the false and need support and education around the issues that are hindering their growth.</p> <p>We believe that long term treatment is necessary to give the patient and the family system an opportunity to create a life worth living. Long term treatment focuses on underlying issues, maladaptive patterns, emotions, thoughts, and behaviors that drive behaviors. Through proper assessment, screening, and conceptualization of each case, the clinical and medical team can effectively treat and educate the patient and the family system.</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="two-column-content relative overflow-hidden p-0 m-0 z-1" > <div class="container-fluid !p-0"> <div class="flex flex-wrap m-0 p-0"> <div class="lg:flex-1 w-full"> <div class="overlay relative overflow-hidden xl:py-[90px] xl:px-80 md:px-60 md:py-60 py-40 px-30 xsscreen2:px-20 bg-white z-1 h-full"> <div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="AdobeStock_326608263" class="block w-full h-full object-cover opacity-[0.4]" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/AdobeStock_326608263.bb58df.jpg">
<noscript><img width="1512" height="1172" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/AdobeStock_326608263.bb58df.jpg" alt="AdobeStock_326608263" class="block w-full h-full object-cover opacity-[0.4]"></noscript>
</div> <div class="title title_blue_one text-center mb-20"> <h3 class="font-700 uppercase"> Our Approach </h3> </div> <div class="content"> <p>At Beachway, we believe that successful treatment must address underlying and sometimes fundamental causes of mental health disorders. For example, we often find that active addiction is the result of individuals self-medicating in an attempt to gain relief from past <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/trauma-focused-therapy/">trauma</a>, <a href="https://www.beachway.com/mental-health/depression-treatment/">depression</a>, or <a href="https://www.beachway.com/mental-health/anxiety-treatment/">anxiety</a>.</p> <p>In seeking professional guidance for a <a href="https://www.beachway.com/substance-abuse/">substance use</a> disorder, it is vital to choose a reputable facility that will provide treatment for particular issues. Here are a few of the benefits of Beachway’s program:</p> <ul> <li>Individualized Treatment Plans are focused on a person’s unique circumstances and background.</li> <li>Holistic Program that will expose a person to a variety of experiences and modalities.</li> <li>Trauma-focused groups are conducted in a safe and supportive environment.</li> <li>Dual Diagnosis treatment plans that can help address underlying causes of addiction.</li> <li>A Comprehensive Treatment Plan that will take into account long-term support and assistance.</li> <li>Alumni and post-discharge support services.</li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> <div class="lg:flex-1 w-full"> <div class="overlay relative overflow-hidden xl:py-[90px] xl:px-80 md:px-60 md:py-60 py-40 px-30 xsscreen2:px-20 bg-blue_seven z-1 h-full"> <div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full -z-1"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="AdobeStock_326608263" class="block w-full h-full object-cover opacity-[0.55]" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/AdobeStock_326608263.bb58df.jpg">
<noscript><img width="1512" height="1172" src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/AdobeStock_326608263.bb58df.jpg" alt="AdobeStock_326608263" class="block w-full h-full object-cover opacity-[0.55]"></noscript>
</div> <div class="title title_blue_one text-center mb-20"> <h3 class="font-700 uppercase"> Our Care </h3> </div> <div class="content"> <p>At Beachway, we recognize the complex nature of mental health and addiction. Our clinical team is committed to providing counseling services in a setting that emphasizes mutual support and respect. Although substance abuse recovery can be a challenging journey, we are committed to fostering an environment that is healthy, productive, and supportive.</p> <p>We believe that lasting recovery must include happy and healthy connections with others; that’s why we also make sure to include space for activities beyond clinical intervention:</p> <ul> <li>Wellness-centered activities (yoga, <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/massage-therapy-for-addiction-recovery/">massage</a>, acupuncture, and physical therapy)</li> <li><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/recreational-therapy/">Recreational Activity</a> (deep-sea fishing, kayaking, beach outings, etc.)</li> <li><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/equine-therapy/">Equine</a>, <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/music-therapy/">music</a>, and <a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/art-therapy/">art therapy</a>.</li> <li><a href="https://www.beachway.com/therapy/holistic-therapy/nutrition-and-fitness/">Nutrition</a> and life-skills workshop</li> <li><a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/specialty-programs/aftercare/">Alumni support</a> activities</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;"><a class="btn-yellow btn-lg" href="https://www.beachway.com/contact/">Start Your Recovery Journey Today</a></p> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </section> </main> <footer> <div class="footer"> <div class="footer__top bg-yellow_one relative overflow-hidden m-0 lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55 z-1"> <div class="hidden sm:block absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full opacity-50 -z-1"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="pattern" class="w-full h-full object-cover" data-lazy-src="https://www.beachway.com/wp-content/themes/beachway-therapy-center/public/images/pattern-1.c9f782.png" />
