 About Our West Palm Beach Therapy Center 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 Our Commitment 
 
 
 
Located in Palm Beach County since 2008, Beachway Therapy Center is a nationally recognized provider of addiction and mental health treatment with a specialty in treating individuals who suffer from co-occurring mental health disorders. By providing evidence-based and innovative holistic therapy , our team of dedicated and experienced professionals empowers our patients to recover in a safe and private environment.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 Philosophy of Treatment 
 
 
 
Treatment involves the sense of community, commitment, accountability, identification with others, and meaningful relationships formed throughout the journey. One of the many gifts of coming to treatment is the interruption of maladaptive patterns and the process of finding out that you are not alone. It is a tremendous relief to finally find a place where the truth can be told, and people understand. Beachway Therapy Center is a place of healing. People shift by taking time to discover who they really are and working to find healthier coping strategies. Committing to treatment and changing an unhealthy way of living is not an easy task.
 
Often, patients want to leave treatment citing many reasons and excuses as to why treatment won’t work for them AND we understand that this is normal behavior for someone who is in pain and cannot manage their emotions in a healthy way. The most common phrase we hear is, “I know what I need to do”. This statement is consistently challenged as we understand that individuals have trouble distinguishing the true from the false and need support and education around the issues that are hindering their growth.
 
We believe that long term treatment is necessary to give the patient and the family system an opportunity to create a life worth living. Long term treatment focuses on underlying issues, maladaptive patterns, emotions, thoughts, and behaviors that drive behaviors. Through proper assessment, screening, and conceptualization of each case, the clinical and medical team can effectively treat and educate the patient and the family system.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 Our Approach 
 
 
 
At Beachway, we believe that successful treatment must address underlying and sometimes fundamental causes of mental health disorders. For example, we often find that active addiction is the result of individuals self-medicating in an attempt to gain relief from past trauma , depression , or anxiety .
 
In seeking professional guidance for a substance use disorder, it is vital to choose a reputable facility that will provide treatment for particular issues. Here are a few of the benefits of Beachway’s program:
 
Individualized Treatment Plans are focused on a person’s unique circumstances and background.
 
Holistic Program that will expose a person to a variety of experiences and modalities.
 
Trauma-focused groups are conducted in a safe and supportive environment.
 
Dual Diagnosis treatment plans that can help address underlying causes of addiction.
 
A Comprehensive Treatment Plan that will take into account long-term support and assistance.
 
Alumni and post-discharge support services.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 Our Care 
 
 
 
At Beachway, we recognize the complex nature of mental health and addiction. Our clinical team is committed to providing counseling services in a setting that emphasizes mutual support and respect. Although substance abuse recovery can be a challenging journey, we are committed to fostering an environment that is healthy, productive, and supportive.
 
We believe that lasting recovery must include happy and healthy connections with others; that’s why we also make sure to include space for activities beyond clinical intervention:
 
Wellness-centered activities (yoga, massage , acupuncture, and physical therapy)
 
 Recreational Activity (deep-sea fishing, kayaking, beach outings, etc.)
 
 Equine , music , and art therapy .
 
 Nutrition and life-skills workshop
 
 Alumni support activities
 
 Start Your Recovery Journey Today 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 Our Accreditations 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Begin Your Recovery at Beachway Therapy Center 
 
 
Discover your personal journey to healing at our West Palm Beach rehab and therapy center. Call us today at 877-284-0353 or complete the contact form below, and a member of our staff will be in touch to help you get started. As a leading addiction treatment center and mental health rehab in Florida, we're here to guide you and your loved ones every step of the way. Our Florida rehab center is committed to helping you achieve lasting recovery.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 First Name *

 Select Contact Method

By submitting a form on this site, you consent to receive calls, texts, and emails from Beachway Therapy Center.

<script type="text/javascript">
function setCookie(name, value, days){
var date = new Date();
date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days*24*60*60*1000)); 
var expires = "; expires=" + date.toGMTString();
document.cookie = name + "=" + value + expires + ";path=/";
}
function getParam(p){
var match = RegExp('[?&]' + p + '=([^&]*)').exec(window.location.search);
return match && decodeURIComponent(match[1].replace(/\+/g, ' '));
}
var gclid = getParam('gclid');
if(gclid){
var gclsrc = getParam('gclsrc');
if(!gclsrc || gclsrc.indexOf('aw') !== -1){
setCookie('gclid', gclid, 90);
}
}
</script>
<script> 
function readCookie(name) { 
var n = name + "="; 
var cookie = document.cookie.split(';'); 
for(var i=0;i < cookie.length;i++) {      
var c = cookie[i];      
while (c.charAt(0)==' '){c = c.substring(1,c.length);}      
if (c.indexOf(n) == 0){return c.substring(n.length,c.length);} 
} 
return null; 
} 
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid1') !== null)

Alternately, you may fill out a quick online form to <a href="https://www.beachway.com/contact/">request a call back </a>at a convenient time. This phone call typically takes between 5 to 10 minutes. Our helpful and knowledgeable admissions staff can help determine next steps for you or a loved one. We’ll also ask about your medical history such as whether there is a history of mental health disorders including <a href="https://www.beachway.com/mental-health/depression-treatment/"> depression</a>, <a href="https://www.beachway.com/mental-health/anxiety-treatment/">anxiety</a>, <a href="https://www.beachway.com/blog/dont-ignore-ptsd-depression-symptoms/">PTSD</a>, <a href="https://www.beachway.com/mental-health/bipolar-disorder-treatment/">bipolar</a>, etc.</p> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__btn pt-20 text-center"> <a href="https://www.beachway.com/our-facility/admissions/insurance/" class="btn-yellow">Verify Insurance</a> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="md:w-6/12 w-full wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out md:p-20 p-10 md:px-20 px-10 wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card__inner xl:py-28 lg:py-20 py-20 lg:px-28 px-20 bg-blue_four shadow-regularshadow rounded-10"> <div class="icon-content-card__title title_blue_one text-center pt-20"> <h6 class="font-bernina uppercase font-700 transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out custom__break-word">Step 2: <br/>Discuss Payment <br/> Options</h6> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__desc pt-20 text-left"> <p>Whether you are utilizing insurance benefits or self-funding, arrangements must be made prior to the admission date. If using insurance, our admissions counselors will verify your benefits and inform you of any out-of-pocket costs. The cost of treatment varies based on several factors, primarily the level of care and length of stay. For a detailed understanding of treatment costs, we recommend speaking with an admissions coordinator.</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="md:w-6/12 w-full wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out md:p-20 p-10 md:px-20 px-10 wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card__inner xl:py-28 lg:py-20 py-20 lg:px-28 px-20 bg-blue_four shadow-regularshadow rounded-10"> <div class="icon-content-card__title title_blue_one text-center pt-20"> <h6 class="font-bernina uppercase font-700 transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out custom__break-word">Step 3: <br/> Arrange Travel</h6> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__desc pt-20 text-left"> <p>To ease the transition from home to our treatment center, our team can help with travel arrangements to bring the patient to us, whether it’s via flight, bus or another means of transportation. We’ll ensure the travel is seamless and smooth. Our team will pick up patients at the airport and provide a ride to our facility. We aim to work as quickly as possible. Many patients can expect to arrive within 24 hours of the completed initial admission assessment.</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="md:w-6/12 w-full wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out md:p-20 p-10 md:px-20 px-10 wow fadeInUp" data-wow-delay="0.2s"> <div class="icon-content-card__inner xl:py-28 lg:py-20 py-20 lg:px-28 px-20 bg-blue_four shadow-regularshadow rounded-10"> <div class="icon-content-card__title title_blue_one text-center pt-20"> <h6 class="font-bernina uppercase font-700 transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out custom__break-word">Step 4: <br/> Arrival and Orientation</h6> </div> <div class="icon-content-card__desc pt-20 text-left"> <p>Once the patient has arrived at Beachway, our team will greet and welcome them. Our team will show the patient around the facility and get him or her settled into a room to design a specific <a href="https://www.beachway.com/treatment-programs/"> treatment plan</a> and begin treatment.</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </section> <section class="step-form-wrapper relative z-1 lg:py-[90px] md:py-60 py-55" > <div class="step-form"> <div class="container-fluid 1366:px-[140px] max_width_1365:px-[80px]"> <div class="step-form__inner"> <div class="step-form__grid grid xl:grid-cols-2 grid-cols-1 xl:gap-x-80 gap-x-15 gap-y-30 items-center"> <div class="step-form__column"> <div class="step-form__content"> <div class="step-form__content--title title_blue_one font-700 font-bernina uppercase"> <h3>Verify Insurance</h3> </div> <div class="step-form__content--desc content pt-20"> <p>An admissions counselor will conduct a free and confidential insurance verification to determine your insurance eligibility for treatment.  Contact 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 Mental Health & Addiction
Rehab Admissions Process
 
Navigating Your Journey to Recovery
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Step 1: 
Contact Us
 
 
 
It’s as simple as calling us at 877-284-0353 . Alternately, you may fill out a quick online form to request a call back at a convenient time. This phone call typically takes between 5 to 10 minutes. Our helpful and knowledgeable admissions staff can help determine next steps for you or a loved one. We’ll also ask about your medical history such as whether there is a history of mental health disorders including depression , anxiety , PTSD , bipolar , etc.
 
 
 Verify Insurance 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Step 2: 
Discuss Payment 
 Options
 
 
 
Whether you are utilizing insurance benefits or self-funding, arrangements must be made prior to the admission date. If using insurance, our admissions counselors will verify your benefits and inform you of any out-of-pocket costs. The cost of treatment varies based on several factors, primarily the level of care and length of stay. For a detailed understanding of treatment costs, we recommend speaking with an admissions coordinator.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Step 3: 
 Arrange Travel
 
 
 
To ease the transition from home to our treatment center, our team can help with travel arrangements to bring the patient to us, whether it’s via flight, bus or another means of transportation. We’ll ensure the travel is seamless and smooth. Our team will pick up patients at the airport and provide a ride to our facility. We aim to work as quickly as possible. Many patients can expect to arrive within 24 hours of the completed initial admission assessment.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Step 4: 
 Arrival and Orientation
 
 
 
Once the patient has arrived at Beachway, our team will greet and welcome them. Our team will show the patient around the facility and get him or her settled into a room to design a specific treatment plan and begin treatment.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Verify Insurance
 
 
 
An admissions counselor will conduct a free and confidential insurance verification to determine your insurance eligibility for treatment. We will follow up with you as soon as possible 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Insurance Information
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 First Name * 
 
 
 
 
 Last Name * 
 
 
 
 
 Phone Number * 
 
 
 
 
 Email Address 
 
 
 
 
 Insurance Provider * 
 
 
 
 
 Member ID * 
 
 
 
 
 Insurance Benefits Phone Number 
 
 
 
 
 Date of Birth 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 Our Accreditations 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Begin Your Recovery at Beachway Therapy Center 
 
 
Discover your personal journey to healing at our West Palm Beach rehab and therapy center. Call us today at 877-284-0353 or complete the contact form below, and a member of our staff will be in touch to help you get started. As a leading addiction treatment center and mental health rehab in Florida, we're here to guide you and your loved ones every step of the way. Our Florida rehab center is committed to helping you achieve lasting recovery.

 Select Contact Method

By submitting a form on this site, you consent to receive calls, texts, and emails from Beachway Therapy Center.

<script type="text/javascript">
function setCookie(name, value, days){
var date = new Date();
date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days*24*60*60*1000)); 
var expires = "; expires=" + date.toGMTString();
document.cookie = name + "=" + value + expires + ";path=/";
}
function getParam(p){
var match = RegExp('[?&]' + p + '=([^&]*)').exec(window.location.search);
return match && decodeURIComponent(match[1].replace(/\+/g, ' '));
}
var gclid = getParam('gclid');
if(gclid){
var gclsrc = getParam('gclsrc');
if(!gclsrc || gclsrc.indexOf('aw') !== -1){
setCookie('gclid', gclid, 90);
}
}
</script>
<script> 
function readCookie(name) { 
var n = name + "="; 
var cookie = document.cookie.split(';'); 
for(var i=0;i < cookie.length;i++) {      
var c = cookie[i];      
while (c.charAt(0)==' '){c = c.substring(1,c.length);}      
if (c.indexOf(n) == 0){return c.substring(n.length,c.length);} 
} 
return null; 
} 
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid1') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid1').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid2') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid2').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid3') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid3').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
window.onload = function() {
if (document.getElementById('field_gclid4') !== null)
document.getElementById('field_gclid4').value = readCookie('gclid');
}
</script>

var lazyLoadInstance = e.detail.instance;
if (window.MutationObserver) {
var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
var image_count = 0;
var iframe_count = 0;
var rocketlazy_count = 0;
mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
for (var i = 0; i < mutation.addedNodes.length; i++) {
if (typeof mutation.addedNodes[i].getElementsByTagName !== 'function') {
continue;
}

continue;
}

iframes = mutation.addedNodes[i].getElementsByTagName('iframe');
is_iframe = mutation.addedNodes[i].tagName == "IFRAME";

iframe_count += iframes.length;
rocketlazy_count += rocket_lazy.length;
if(is_image){
image_count += 1;
}
if(is_iframe){
iframe_count += 1;
}
}
} );
if(image_count > 0 || iframe_count > 0 || rocketlazy_count > 0){
lazyLoadInstance.update();
}
} );

observer.observe(b, config);
}

 Our Accreditations 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Begin Your Recovery at Beachway Therapy Center 
 
 
Discover your personal journey to healing at our West Palm Beach rehab and therapy center. Call us today at 877-284-0353 or complete the contact form below, and a member of our staff will be in touch to help you get started. As a leading addiction treatment center and mental health rehab in Florida, we're here to guide you and your loved ones every step of the way. Our Florida rehab center is committed to helping you achieve lasting recovery.

rawMentions: Detox Program
Drug & Alcohol Detox Treatment Center in Florida
We offer a full continuum of care – from on-site medical detox and inpatient rehab programs to outpatient therapy and aftercare – to support patients at every stage of the journey.
On-Site Detox Rehab Services
Detox is an important phase of addiction recovery.

Depending on the specific substance and severity of addiction, medical detox can be an extremely vulnerable time for patients and may be accompanied by uncomfortable and sometimes fatal withdrawal symptoms.
Learn More About Detox Programs
Detox

rawMentions: Residential / Inpatient Program
Inpatient
Inpatient Rehab in West Palm Beach
Inpatient and Outpatient Rehab Programs in Florida
Unlike some rehabs in Florida, Beachway Therapy Center offers a full range of treatment solutions, including both inpatient rehab and outpatient programs to meet each client’s unique needs.

Our inpatient treatment provides a luxury experience with top-tier amenities and and 24/7 support, helping individuals conquer addiction or mental health challenges through intensive therapy and holistic care in residence.
We offer a full continuum of care – from on-site medical detox and inpatient rehab programs to outpatient therapy and aftercare – to support patients at every stage of the journey.
When an individual enters a long-term inpatient rehab center, they gain a support network of trained therapists, counselors, medical professionals, and other patients.

Outpatient
Inpatient and Outpatient Rehab Programs in Florida
Unlike some rehabs in Florida, Beachway Therapy Center offers a full range of treatment solutions, including both inpatient rehab and outpatient programs to meet each client’s unique needs.
We also offer flexible outpatient programs – such as Partial Hospitalization (PHP) and Intensive Outpatient (IOP) – for those who need structured support while transitioning back to daily life.
We offer a full continuum of care – from on-site medical detox and inpatient rehab programs to outpatient therapy and aftercare – to support patients at every stage of the journey.

rawMentions: Outpatient Program
Dual Diagnosis
Beachway also specializes in dual diagnosis treatment, simultaneously treating substance abuse and co-occurring mental health issues (like depression or anxiety) that can hinder recovery.
Dual Diagnosis Treatment Program
Our dual diagnosis treatment program allows us to proactively identify and treat mental health issues and other factors that may be contributing to a patient's addictive behavior.
Learn More About Dual Diagnosis Recovery
As a nationally recognized rehab center, we specialize in treating co-occurring mental health, trauma, and addiction disorders with outstanding, personalized care.
This comprehensive approach sets us apart from other rehabs in Florida that may not address co-occurring disorders, including facilities like Compassion Behavioral Health.
Dual Diagnosis treatment plans that can help address underlying causes of addiction.

Located in Palm Beach County since 2008, Beachway Therapy Center is a nationally recognized provider of addiction and mental health treatment with a specialty in treating individuals who suffer from co-occurring mental health disorders.
